summary: Fixed the round-5 finding (filterRelatedRowsToLatestScope only matched category, not geo/timeframe) and proactively fixed the same gap in filterInterestRowsToLatestScope (matched category/property/compare_scope but not geo/timeframe) before it could be caught in a further review round.
reason: Both scope-filtering helpers introduced in round 3 only matched a subset of the dimensions already present in their respective cache IDs since round 1/2. filterRelatedRowsToLatestScope matched only category, missing geo/timeframe (both already part of the gt_related_term ID); filterInterestRowsToLatestScope matched category/property/compare_scope but missed geo/timeframe (queryInterestPointsForKeyword calls the geo-unscoped query variant, so geo mixing was live). Both now match on the full scope tuple already used for the write-side cache ID.
validated_outcome: Live dogfood full matrix: 65/65 pass. go vet/go test/govulncheck clean.
